name: goal_ui-research
description: RuFlo Research — Goal-Oriented Action Planning research workflows exposed as MCP tools. Lets external claude-flow agents drive end-to-end research from the CLI: goal generation, per-step research, action-item synthesis, config optimization, and a full-pipeline aggregate. Per ADR-098 (R-5).

tools.name: generate_research_goal
tools.description: Generate 3 specific, novel research goals for a given category. Wraps functions/generate-research-goal/handler.ts.

category.description: Category slug (finance, business, marketing, medical, education, coding, technical, ai-ml). Validated by IdentifierSchema.

customContext.description: Optional free-text context to refine the generated goals.

tools.name: research_step
tools.description: Execute one research step (single-call OR 4-agent swarm per RUFLO_USE_SWARM env). Returns a flat array of {title, content, source?, confidence?, timestamp?} findings. Wraps functions/research-step/handler.ts.

goal.description: The overall research goal. Validated by UserPromptInputSchema (control-byte rejection, 10K cap).

stepTitle.description: Title of the current research step (e.g., 'Discovery', 'Synthesis').

stepDescription.description: Description of what the step should accomplish.

stepType.description: Step type identifier (goal-analysis, web-search, document-analysis, etc.).

previousStepsData.description: Findings from prior steps for context.

tools.name: generate_action_items
tools.description: Synthesize prioritized, structured action items + executive summary from the goal + accumulated research findings. Returns the rich shape ResearchReportModal renders. Wraps functions/generate-action-items/handler.ts.

researchContext.description: Per-step findings used to ground the action items.

totalSteps.description: Total number of research steps executed.

totalDataPoints.description: Total findings count across all steps.

tools.name: optimize_research_config
tools.description: Generate an optimized GOAP research config for the given preset + optional current goal. Wraps functions/optimize-research-config/handler.ts.

preset.description: Preset slug (academic-deep, market-trends, technical-feasibility, etc.). Validated by IdentifierSchema.

currentGoal.description: Optional current goal text — refines the config to fit the goal.

tools.name: run_full_research
tools.description: End-to-end aggregate: takes a goal + preset and runs the full pipeline (config → 7-step research → action items + summary). Lets an external claude-flow agent drive RuFlo Research as a single subroutine. Per ADR-098.

stepCount.description: Number of research steps to execute. Default: 7.
